'''√f-w-j''' ('''kafawaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:madam|madam]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:madam|madam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √f-w-j
|-
! Lemma
| kafawaj
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thifawaj || jifawaj || shifawaj || kifawaj
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthufawaj || jujufawaj || shushufawaj || kukufawaj
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thufawaj || jufawaj || shufawaj || kufawaj
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thufawaj || jufawaj || shufawaj || kufawaj
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thefawaj || jefawaj || shefawaj || kefawaj
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothofawaj || jojofawaj || shoshofawaj || kokofawaj
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thofawaj || jofawaj || shofawaj || kofawaj
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thofawaj || jofawaj || shofawaj || kofawaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fawaj || fawaj || fawaj || fawaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fawaj || fawaj || fawaj || fawaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fawaj || fawaj || fawaj || fawaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fawaj || fawaj || fawaj || fawaj
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæfawaj || jæfawaj || shæfawaj || kæfawaj
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathafawaj || jajafawaj || shashafawaj || kakafawaj
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thafawaj || jafawaj || shafawaj || kafawaj
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thafawaj || jafawaj || shafawaj || kafawaj
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shafawaj
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshafawaj
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishafawaj
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shafawajnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshafawajnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishafawajnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shafawajshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshafawajnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishafawajshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shafawajro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshafawajnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishafawajro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shafawajmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshafawajnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishafawajmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shafawajsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshafawajnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishafawajsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shafawajng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshafawajnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishafawajng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shafawajya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshafawajnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishafawajya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shafawajyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshafawajnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishafawajyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shafawajnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshafawajnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishafawajnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shafawajnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafawajnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafawajnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shafawajnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshafawajnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafawajnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shafawajshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshafawajnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishafawajshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shafawajshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafawajnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafawajshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shafawajshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshafawajnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafawajshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shafawajronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshafawajnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishafawajronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shafawajroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshafawajnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishafawajroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shafawajromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshafawajnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafawajromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shafawajmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshafawajnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishafawajmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shafawajmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshafawajnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishafawajmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shafawajmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafawajnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafawajmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
